title: RoofTrace JSON export
description: Public, versioned JSON export of a roof measurement (ADR-015). Independent of the internal pipeline schema (shared/pipeline_schema.json): this is the integration contract downstream consumers (insurance, estimating tools) script against. Coordinates are decimal-degree [lat, lng] (FLIPPED from the internal GeoJSON [lon, lat] convention); areas in square feet; pitch as rise-per-12 plus derived degrees.

schema_version.description: Export contract version. Independent of pipelineSchemaVersion. Bumped on any breaking change to this document's shape.

predominant_pitch_ratio.description: Area-weighted predominant pitch, rise per 12 of run.

predominant_pitch_degrees.description: DERIVED from predominant_pitch_ratio: atan(ratio/12) in degrees.

items.description: [lat, lng] in WGS84 decimal degrees (FLIPPED from the internal [lon, lat]).

A detected roof feature. No geographic center is emitted (feature pins cannot be precisely geolocated without an orchestrator change — documented v1 limitation): bbox_norm is normalized [0,1] image-space against the satellite tile.

bbox_norm.description: Normalized [x0, y0, x1, y1] in [0,1] image space.

on_site_visualizations.description: Projected on-site visualizations: each is a capture photo with the measured roof projected onto it. Added in 1.1.0 (additive). Absent/empty when the job has no on-site capture.

photo_url.description: Signed URL of the source capture photo.

composite_url.description: Signed URL of the rendered photo+overlay composite.

overlay_svg_url.description: Signed URL of the vector (SVG) overlay.

pose_confidence.description: Confidence in the camera pose used to project this overlay.

provenance.description: Best-effort source attributions and vintage, mapped from the orchestrator's NESTED provenance. Every field is optional.

model_3d_url.description: Always null in v1 (3D model export deferred).
